title: Staff Cloud Architect (Delivery) - EMEA
description:
**Location**  

Our Staff Cloud Architect will be an integral part of our Forward Deployed Engineering team. This role is based remotely (no offices) in Ireland, ideally in or around the UK, Ireland, Estonia, the Netherlands, Sweden and Israel.


**Who We Are**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.



Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.



With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Team: Forward Deployed Engineering – Delivery**



Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs) sit at the intersection of customers, cloud platforms, and DoiT Cloud Intelligence™. In the Delivery capacity, FDEs are embedded technical partners for existing customers, focused on:


* Making DCI trusted and indispensable in day-to-day cloud operations
* Removing technical barriers to adoption across cost, reliability, security, and performance
* Turning one-off solutions into reusable patterns ("Gravel Roads") that improve both customer outcomes and the product
* FDEs operate as part of integrated account teams or as pulled FDEs, working closely with Customer Success Managers (CSMs), Account Managers (AMs), Technical Account Managers (TAMs), other FDEs, and Product Support Specialists (PSS) to deliver impactful outcomes across customer segments and tiers.


**The Opportunity**  

Hire, onboard and manage a team of Senior Cloud Architects specializing in Kubernetes and container orchestration, data and analytics, machine learning, cost optimization and empower them to become the best version of themselves. Enable your team to guide customers on how to configure and deploy their products or services on Amazon Web Services or Google Cloud and act as an escalation point and provide technical support to customers on innovative/complex cloud topics.


**Responsibilities**


**Customer-Facing Delivery**


* Build, lead, and manage a strong team of Cloud Architects/FDEs that help customers design, deploy, and optimize production-grade cloud workloads on AWS, Google Cloud, and/or Azure.
* Ensure your team serves as the primary technical delivery partner for customers, with a focus on CloudOps/FinOps, reliability, security, and performance.
* Act as an escalation point for complex cloud topics and ensure high-quality, well-explained resolutions.
* Drive your team to plan and deliver structured engagements such as cost optimization workshops, architecture deep dives, security/reliability reviews, and product adoption sessions.


**Proactive Engagement & Account Team Alignment**


* Shift your team's model from reactive to proactive
* by driving signal-based outreach (usage, health, roadmap gaps, known risks).
* Embed FDEs into account teams and ensure they participate in defined account activities - TKOs, quarterly reviews, objective setting, and customer syncs.
* Coordinate with TPOs, CSMs, AMs, TAMs, and other FDEs to deliver measurable impact across customer segments.


**DCI Product Expertise & Adoption**


* Coach your team to become experts in DCI - Cloud Analytics, Insights, Cloud Composer, CloudFlow, DataHub, and Enterprise Platforms such as PerfectScale and SELECT and use these tools hands-on with customers.
* Drive your team to embed DCI into customers' FinOps, observability, CI/CD, and governance workflows.


**Paving "Gravel Roads" & Product Feedback**


* Foster a builder culture: expect every FDE to turn one-off customer solutions into reusable patterns - playbooks, Terraform modules, CloudFlow templates, Composer Recipes, and internal docs or build products alongside our R&D team.
* Ensure your team provides structured feedback to Product and Engineering on product gaps, friction points, automation and improvement opportunities.
* Support the FDE model by enabling FDEs to partner deeply with R&D and product stakeholders


**People Leadership & Career Development**


* Provide technical leadership and guidance to team members, fostering a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.
* Mentor and coach FDEs, providing regular feedback and performance evaluations to drive career development and growth.
* Drive team engagement, define clear role expectations, and align individual growth plans with the FDE career ladder.
* Lead the OKR process for the team, including setting, tracking, and ensuring alignment with broader company objectives.


**Qualifications**


* 10+ year of experience architecting, developing, and troubleshooting internet-scale, production-grade distributed systems
* 5+ year of experience in cloud environments such as Amazon Web Services and/or Google Cloud with the focus on selecting appropriate tools to tackle the business problem at the right scale
* Proven people leadership experience
* Experience with container technologies, e.g. Kubernetes
* Experience with networking, e.g. TCP/IP, routing, network topologies, and VPN
* Experience with Linux operating systems administration and internals such as filesystems, system calls.
* Great verbal and written communication skills, as well as presentation skills in English


**Bonus Points**


* AWS Certified Professional Solution Architect
* Some experience in software development in one or more languages such as Java, Python, PHP, Go, or Rust; as well as shell scripting


**Are you a Do'er?**  

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.



We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.


What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge, and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.



Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.



We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.



Benefits for full-time employees include:


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.



#LI-Remote
company_description: We help cloud-driven organizations understand and harness the cloud to drive business growth.  We do this by providing intelligent technology and continuous engagement with unrivaled cloud expertise.

title: Software Engineering Intern - Summer 2026
description:
About Us:

Rivian is on a mission to keep the world adventurous forever. This goes for the emissions-free Electric Adventure Vehicles we build, and the curious, courageous souls we seek to attract.  

As a company, we constantly challenge what’s possible, never simply accepting what has always been done. We reframe old problems, seek new solutions and operate comfortably in areas that are unknown. Our backgrounds are diverse, but our team shares a love of the outdoors and a desire to protect it for future generations.
Responsibilities:

You will work alongside our senior engineers on projects that could include:

* API Development: Building and refining both general and "Backend-for-Frontend" APIs that handle telemetry and charger data.
* Event-Driven Systems: Working with NATS/JetStream and Protobuf to manage high-speed data flows.
* Data Reliability: Developing automated tests and CI/CD pipelines to ensure our services stay performant and resilient.
* Navigation app development: We work on both the ABetterRouteplanner stand-alone app as well as the RVT in-car Android navigation app - and you could be too.
* Collaborative Innovation: Participating in code reviews and architectural discussions, bringing a fresh perspective to our technical challenges.


Qualifications:

We are looking for curious, driven students who love solving complex logic puzzles.

* Education: Currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.
* Programming Proficiency: You have a solid foundation and hands-on skills in one or more programming languages, be it Kotlin, Python, Typescript, Golang, Rust or C++.
* Architectural Curiosity: You are interested in how distributed systems work—how data moves from a car’s telemetry to a user's screen in milliseconds.
* Problem Solver: You enjoy breaking down big problems into manageable pieces and aren't afraid to ask "why" or "how can we make this better?"
* Team Player: You have an open, growth-oriented mindset and enjoy collaborating with others to reach a goal.


Pay Disclosure:
**Total Rewards**  

Total compensation packages for this position include base salary, eligibility for an annual performance bonus, and eligibility for equity.  

In addition, our benefits package has been designed to support the health and wellness of our employees. Benefit offerings include Flex Time Off, retirement savings plans as well as medical, vision and dental coverage. For more information on RV Tech’s comprehensive benefits package for full-time employees, check out our Global Benefits Site.
Company Statements:
#### **Equal Opportunity**


Rivian is an equal opportunity employer and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, genetic information or characteristics, physical or mental disability, marital/domestic partner status, age, military/veteran status, medical condition, or any other characteristic protected by law.  

Rivian is committed to ensuring that our hiring process is accessible for persons with disabilities. If you have a disability or limitation, such as those covered by the Americans with Disabilities Act, that requires accommodations to assist you in the search and application process, please email us at candidateaccommodations@rivian.com.#### **Candidate Data Privacy**


Rivian may collect, use and disclose your personal information or personal data (within the meaning of the applicable data protection laws) when you apply for employment and/or participate in our recruitment processes (“Candidate Personal Data”). This data includes contact, demographic, communications, educational, professional, employment, social media/website, network/device, recruiting system usage/interaction, security and preference information. Rivian may use your Candidate Personal Data for the purposes of (i) tracking interactions with our recruiting system; (ii) carrying out, analyzing and improving our application and recruitment process, including assessing you and your application and conducting employment, background and reference checks; (iii) establishing an employment relationship or entering into an employment contract with you; (iv) complying with our legal, regulatory and corporate governance obligations; (v) recordkeeping; (vi) ensuring network and information security and preventing fraud; and (vii) as otherwise required or permitted by applicable law.  

Rivian may share your Candidate Personal Data with (i) internal personnel who have a need to know such information in order to perform their duties, including individuals on our People Team, Finance, Legal, and the team(s) with the position(s) for which you are applying; (ii) Rivian affiliates; and (iii) Rivian’s service providers, including providers of background checks, staffing services, and cloud services.  

Rivian may transfer or store internationally your Candidate Personal Data, including to or in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and the European Union and in the cloud, and this data may be subject to the laws and accessible to the courts, law enforcement and national security authorities of such jurisdictions. **Please note that we are currently not accepting applications from third party application services.**

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
Göteborg, Malmö, Stockholm


Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead



Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.  

  

At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.  

  

Your role  

We are looking for an experienced Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.  

As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.  

  

You will:  

* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities

Your profile  

We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.  

  

You also have:  

* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English

  

What we believe you will enjoy about working here  

* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person

  

Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.  

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*  

*#LI-JF1*
Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.  

Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Client Delivery Manager - nyce.logic
description:
**At Extenda Retail, we empower businesses with innovative solutions that transform logistics and retail. NYCE.LOGIC, our advanced Warehouse Management System (WMS), enables businesses to optimize their supply chain with cutting-edge technology, automation, and real-time insights.**

  

We are looking for a Client Delivery Manager to lead the successful implementation and delivery of NYCE.LOGIC WMS solutions for our global clients. In this role, you will drive software implementations, ensuring that our clients achieve maximum value from our platform. From proof of concept to full-scale SaaS deployments, you will oversee projects of varying complexity.


As Client Delivery Manager, you will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and ensuring the smooth execution of deliveries across development teams—both in-house and through global partners.


**Previous Experience**

  

You probably bring 5+ years of project management experience, ideally within a product-centric, agile environment. Experience with cloud-based software deliveries is highly advantageous. You should be comfortable taking a holistic view of the delivery and also have a strong commercial mindset and understanding of the business aspects of software deliveries. Experience as a service manager responsible for continuous delivery of maintenance, support, and enhancements will also help you in this position as maintaining the quality and service levels for existing products to the clients is an important aspect of this role.

**Responsibilities**

* Plan and execute implementation projects with NYCE.LOGIC WMS.
* Manage client expectations, relationships, and overall satisfaction throughout the project lifecycle.
* Ensure successful delivery within budget, scope, and timeline..
* Monitor financials, project schedule, and scope to keep delivery on track.
* Coordinate and align multiple teams to ensure seamless integration and deployment.
* Proactively identify, manage, and mitigate risks, issues, and dependencies, collaborating with teams, clients, and stakeholders.
* Apply WMS best practices and methodologies, assessing risks in processes, people, and technology, and adjusting plans accordingly.
* Lead and facilitate status meetings with teams and stakeholders, ensuring transparency and alignment.
* Continuously drive improvements in ways of working through inspection, adaptation, and optimization.
* Foster a collaborative, open, and transparent project environment.
* Maintain proactive communication with clients and key stakeholders, ensuring alignment and engagement.

**Skills And Experience**

* 5+ years of project management experience, delivering WMS or supply chain software solutions from inception to deployment.
* Strong ability to manage client-facing projects with a focus on warehouse management and logistics solutions.
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to tailor messages to different audiences.
* Demonstrated leadership skills across technical, commercial, and interpersonal aspects.
* Experience in Agile software delivery methodologies.
* Background in professional services, consulting, or enterprise software implementation.
* Highly analytical and data-driven approach to decision-making.
* University degree in Computer Science, Supply Chain Management, or equivalent experience.
* Strong understanding of software development processes and warehouse operations.
* Fluent in Swedish, both verbal and written


Sounds interesting? Do you have what it takes? Be sure to apply as soon as possible.

**Location**


Gothenburg

title: Agentic AI Solution Specialist (Cloud & Custom Applications)
description:
Stockholm, Malmö, Göteborg, Helsingborg


Agentic AI Solution Specialist (Cloud & Custom Applications)



Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!


Din roll


Som Agentic AI Solution Specialist blir du en drivande kraft i att forma framtidens intelligenta automation. Du kommer att arbeta nära våra kunder för att identifiera affärsmöjligheter och omsätta dem till robusta, agentbaserade AI-lösningar. Rollen är konsultativ och kombinerar tekniskt djup med affärsmässighet – du är både rådgivare och inspiratör. Utöver arbetet med kunder blir också en viktig del av vårt interna kompetensnätverk genom kunskapsdelning, pre-sales och strategiska initiativ. Eftersom rollen är ny får du stor frihet att påverka dess utveckling och forma vägarna framåt för att skapa verkligt värde för Capgemini och våra kunder.  

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*

  

* Driva kundprojekt inom Agentic AI och intelligent automation från idé till leverans.
* Agera senior advisor i strategiska initiativ och projekt som rör Agentic AI, och bidra med expertstöd i komplexa frågor.
* Utveckla och presentera go-to-market-förslag samt delta i pre-salesaktiviteter.
* Bygga och dela kunskap internt genom Capgeminis Guilds och Centers of Excellences, samt kombinera teknisk expertis med affärsdrivande och kommunikativa insatser för att inspirera och sälja in lösningar.

  

Din profil

* Dokumenterad kompetens inom Agentic AI och erfarenhet av att omsätta komplex teknik till affärsvärde.
* Djup teknisk expertis kombinerad med affärsmässighet och en konsultativ, kommunikativ och pedagogisk approach – du kan förklara teknik på ett sätt som skapar förståelse och engagemang.
* Förståelse för att förändringsinitiativ handlar om människor lika mycket som teknik – du skapar engagemang och säkerställer adoption av nya lösningar.
* Flytande kunskaper i engelska och svenska i tal och skrift

  

Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas

* Möjligheten att forma en pionjärroll med stor frihet och påverkan på dess utformning – du blir en nyckelperson i att driva intelligent automation och Agentic AI hos våra kunder och internt.
* Tillgång till den senaste tekniken och plattformar som Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI foundry, UiPath Agentic och Google Cloud, samt ett globalt nätverk av experter.
* En kultur som uppmuntrar innovation, kompetensutveckling och kunskapsdelning, där du får utrymme att leda förändring och skapa verklig impact.

  

Ansökan

*Efter att du skickat in din ansökan gör vi en första urvalsbedömning. Därefter följer en telefonintervju med ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner, en intervju med rekryterande chef på kontoret och en teknisk intervju där vi går djupare in på din kompetens. Som avslutning genomför vi relevanta tester och referenstagning innan vi går vidare till ett eventuellt erbjudande.*  

  

*Vi värdesätter din tid och ser till att du får tydlig kommunikation och snabb återkoppling genom hela processen. Du kommer löpande kunna ställa frågor och få uppdateringar från ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner – vårt mål är att skapa en positiv upplevelse där du får en rättvis bild av både rollen och oss som arbetsgivare.*  

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*




#LI-JK1


Om Capgemini


Capgemini är en global partner inom affärs- och tekniktransformation som hjälper organisationer att påskynda övergången till en digital och hållbar värld, och samtidigt gör skillnad för företag och samhälle. Det är en ansvarsfull och mångsidig organisation med 340 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Med ett starkt arv som sträcker sig över 55 år tillbaka har Capgemini sina kunders förtroende att hjälpa dem frigöra värdet av teknik för att tillgodose hela deras affärsbehov. Capgemini levererar helhetslösningar som utnyttjar styrkan från strategi och design till teknik. Allt drivet av en marknadsledande kapacitet inom AI, generativ AI, moln och data, kombinerat med en djup branschexpertis och ett ekosystem av partners. År 2024 rapporterade Capgemini Group globala intäkter på 22,1 miljarder euro.  

  

Get The Future You Want | www.capgemini.com

title: Senior Management Consultant / Manager, Supply Chain & Logistics
description:
Göteborg, Stockholm


Senior Management Consultant / Manager, Supply Chain & Logistics



At Capgemini Invent, we believe difference drives change. As inventive transformation consultants, we blend our strategic, creative and scientific capabilities, collaborating closely with clients to deliver cutting-edge solutions. Join us to drive transformation tailored to our client's challenges of today and tomorrow. Informed and validated by science and data. Superpowered by creativity and design. All underpinned by technology created with purpose.


Your role
As part of the Intelligent Supply Chain team, you will work as a management consultant, helping clients design and execute supply chain and logistics strategies. You will turn concepts into measurable results and work with both business and technology teams in high-profile operations transformation projects.


Typical assignments can include:


* Develop & Implement Operational Logistics Strategies – Support clients in defining and implementing strategies across network design, transportation, warehousing, and distribution.
* Drive Business Adoption in Digital Logistics Transformation – Serve as the link between business teams and system specialists by leading workshops, gathering requirements, and supporting testing to ensure solutions meet all needs. Collaborate with stakeholders to drive adoption of new tools and processes.
* Enhance Future‑Ready Logistics Capabilities – Strengthen modern logistics practices through smarter use of data and AI, support the adoption of automation and visibility solutions, and help shape future‑ready operating models.

Your profile
We believe you bring experience or strong interest in one or several of the following areas:


* Transport Management System (TMS) & Business Analysis – Knowledge of leading TMS platforms, combined with business analyst experience in understanding business needs, documenting requirements, and supporting implementation work.
* Logistics Operations & Network Design – Practical experience within transportation, warehousing, and distribution operations - gained through hands-on operational roles or project/business analyst positions. Ability to design distribution networks, including experience with modeling tools and scenario‑based analysis.
* Analytical Problem Solving – Skilled at analyzing data, breaking down complex issues, and turning insights into clear recommendations while supporting teams in defining better ways of working.
* Change & Stakeholder Engagement – Strong communication skills with the ability to facilitate discussions, align stakeholders, and drive adoption across business and IT teams.

Additional Requirements


* 2-7 years’ work experience, ideally from management consulting or equivalent
* A master’s degree with a business, technical or supply chain/operations focus
* Excellent Swedish and English language skills and Swedish work permit required
What you'll love about working here
At Capgemini Invent, you’ll be part of a global team shaping the future of for supply chain & logistics. We offer:




* Impactful Work: Drive transformation for some of the world’s leading companies within the supply chain & logistics industry, helping organizations define their strategic direction and put in place governance structures and delivery plans that turn vision into tomorrow’s ground-breaking services and solutions.
* Innovation at Scale: Work with cutting-edge technologies and strategies to solve complex industry challenges.
* Career Growth: Access world-class training, mentorship, and opportunities to accelerate your career.
* Collaborative Culture: Join a diverse, inclusive team that values creativity, curiosity, and bold ideas.
* Purpose-Driven Projects: Help clients build sustainable, customer-centric solutions that make a real difference.

Need to know
Location: In line with our trust-based culture, Capgemini Invent offers a hybrid working model, and for this role you will be based in our attractively located Stockholm or Gothenburg office, ready to travel to our clients’ sites when needed.




As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.




*Sounds like the next step in your career? We review applications on an ongoing basis and encourage you to apply as soon as possible!*


About Capgemini
Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry.

  

Get to know us better! Please visit www.capgemini.com/invent, look us up on Instagram @capgeminiinvent\_swedfi

title: Cloud Infrastructure Architect AWS
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar?

AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cloud Migration Factory, Portfolio analysis tooling) samt hantering av storskaliga migreringar från datacenter till datacenter och/eller från datacenter till molnet; drift av datacenter (t.ex. datasäkring, övervakning, larm och notifieringar)
* Erfarenhet av att integrera AWS AI/ML-tjänster (SageMaker, Bedrock, Amazon Q); förståelse för styrning inom AI/ML och ansvarsfulla AI-praktiker

title: Solution Engineering Internship Opportunities
description:
**Overview**
**Start date: September 2026 (for 10 months)**
**Type of Employment: Full - Time Internship**
**Location: Stockhlom, Sweden**
**Application must be submitted in English**
 Come build community, explore your passions and do your best work at Microsoft with thousands of University interns from every corner of the world. This opportunity will allow you to bring your aspirations, talent, potential—and excitement for the journey ahead.
   

  

 As a Technology Specialist Intern, you will engage with and guide customers toward technical decisions to purchase and use Microsoft technology. You will leverage sales strategy to address customer digital transformation and align technology to customer business needs. You will understand customer needs, collects customer feedback, and provides strategic input to customers. You will act as an orchestration point for technical resources and works to resolve blockers in order to achieve solution implementations.
   

  

 At Microsoft, Interns work on real-world projects in collaboration with teams across the world, while having fun along the way. You’ll be empowered to build community, explore your passions and achieve your goals. This is your chance to bring your solutions and ideas to life while working on cutting-edge technology.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develops understanding of current customer context and anticipates next steps. Uses product expertise to build credibility with customers.
* Reviews customer interactions and raises competitive information to account teams to contribute to development and landing of compete strategies.
* Contributes to product strategy by soliciting and communicating customer feedback.
* Tailors Microsoft standard messaging to audience using knowledge of specific Microsoft products.
* Contributes to demonstrations (e.g., proof of concept [POC] sessions) of solutions based on specific Microsoft products through initial engagements and coaching from senior colleagues. Leverages partner/customer teams as needed to prove product capabilities and integration into customer environment.
* Consumes and leverages readiness materials to expand domain knowledge and practices expertise by communicating with customers, partners, and senior colleagues.


**Qualifications**
**Required Qualifications:**
* Currently pursuing a Bachelor's, Master's or PhD degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field


 or Must have at least one additional quarter/semester of school remaining following the completion of the internship
   

  

* You must be legally authorised to work in Sweden to be eligible for this role. (Legally authorised = has citizenship or has been granted a valid visa or work permit)
* Fluent English.


 #EiP #MCAPSEiP
   

  

 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. title: Entra ID/Azure‑specialist
description:
**Entra ID / Azure Specialist – Bli en nyckelperson i vår kunds Cloud‑resa** 




 Vi söker en driven och kunnig Entra ID/Azure‑specialist som vill vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar. Hos oss får du en central roll där du analyserar, utvecklar och optimerar processer – alltid med säkerhet som högsta prioritet. Du blir en del av vår IAM‑avdelning inom gruppen Access Management och får arbeta med modern teknik i komplexa miljöer.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 I rollen kommer du bland annat att:
 


* Designa, utveckla och implementera molnlösningar i Entra ID.
* Hantera, optimera och säkra Azure‑miljöer för bästa prestanda och skalbarhet.
* Samarbeta med interna team och intressenter för att förstå behov och skapa rätt Azure‑lösningar.
* Arbeta med konfigurationskontroll och Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Eventuellt ingå i beredskapstjänst.



  





**För att trivas och lyckas i rollen** 




 Du är självgående, nyfiken och har ett stort intresse för Azure och IAM. Du tycker om att lära dig nytt, dela med dig av kunskap och bidra i teamarbete. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet från flera olika Azure‑miljöer.
 



  





**Kravprofil** 



* Erfarenhet av Entra ID
* Bred kompetens inom IAM
* Kännedom om JEA, JIT, RBAC, ABAC & Access Review
* Erfarenhet av federerad SSO: SAML, OAuth, OIDC
* Mycket goda kunskaper i PowerShell
* Vana vid problemlösning och felsökning i komplexa teammiljöer
* Flytande svenska och engelska



  





**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av ADFS och Active Directory
* Kännedom om loggningsverktyg och Azure Defender‑sviten
* Erfarenhet av Azure Landing Zone
* Kunskaper i Terraform, Python och Ansible
* Erfarenhet av GitOps & IaC



  





**Uppdragsinformation** 



* **Placering:** 
 Nära något av våra kontor, minst 3 dagar på plats (Linköping, Malmö, Karlskrona, Göteborg – Lindholmspiren/Lackarebäck, Jönköping, Karlskoga, Solna, Luleå, Nyköping)
* **Arbete på distans:** 
 Möjligt upp till 2 dagar/vecka
* **Start:** 
 Omgående
* **Uppdragslängd:** 
 Tillsvidare
* **Omfattning:** 
 100%



  





**Kontakt** 




 För frågor om uppdraget, kontakta ansvarig Business Manager,
 **Joanna Nyström @** 
 joanna.nystrom@akkodisgroup.com
 



  





**Om Akkodis** 




 På Akkodis är du som konsult vår högsta prioritet. Vi stöttar dig i din karriärutveckling och erbjuder uppdrag i olika branscher, system och miljöer. Du omfattas av kollektivavtal, försäkringar, friskvårdsbidrag och rabatter på träningskort. Vi ordnar regelbundet sociala aktiviteter och arbetar tillsammans för att skapa framtidens lösningar inom IT och Engineering.
 



  





 Varm välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Datacenter Network Engineer
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Datacentre Network Engineer ( GPU‑as‑a‑Service )
 



**Duration:** 
 Ongoing
 



**Workload:** 
 Full time hours
 



**Setup:** 
 Freelance (Daily rate / Limited Company / Umbrella / Sole Trader)
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
 



  





 The client is seeking a Network Engineer to design, implement, and optimise high‑performance network architectures that support GPUaaS, HPC and AI workloads within an on‑premise Datacentre cloud environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Design and implement scalable, resilient network architectures purpose‑built for GPUaaS environments.
* Troubleshoot performance bottlenecks across service clusters, ensuring optimal utilisation and low‑latency connectivity.
* Implement advanced security controls to protect network infrastructure supporting GPU resources.
* Integrate new GPUaaS and HPC services into existing enterprise network environments.
* Diagnose and resolve issues related to connectivity, latency, routing, bandwidth and virtualised network layers.



  





**Must‑Have Skills:** 



* Strong experience designing and managing datacentre networks at scale.
* Proficiency with enterprise monitoring tools and network performance diagnostics.
* Knowledge of HPC/GPU networking technologies (e.g., InfiniBand, RoCE).
* Experience with automation/orchestration tools such as Ansible or Puppet.
* Strong background with switches, routers, firewalls, and virtualisation (VMs, containers).
* Understanding of cloud infrastructure and its interaction with GPU‑accelerated services.
* Experience with scripting/automation using Python or PowerShell.



  





**Nice‑to‑Have:** 



* Networking/security certifications (e.g., CCIE, cybersecurity certs).
* Experience with NVIDIA networking, Azure, or GPU vendor ecosystems.
* Knowledge of IDS/IPS, encryption solutions and high‑performance workload management.

title: AI System admin & devops
description:
*Are you interested in building platforms that enable next-generation AI solutions?* 
 At Saab, we are expanding our Data & AI platform capabilities and are now looking for
 **a Data & AI Platform Engineer** 
 with DevOps experience to join the Software Excellence and Information Assurance (SWEIXA) team within the Surveillance business area.
   

  

 In this role, you will work with designing, deploying and operating cloud-native Data & AI platforms, enabling development teams to build and run advanced AI solutions. You will collaborate closely with developers and engineers to ensure our platforms are efficient, secure and scalable.
   

  

 Your Role
   

  

 As a Data & AI Platform Engineer, you will work hands-on with platform engineering, automation and AI environments. The role combines DevOps practices, platform operations and AI infrastructure.
   

  

 Your responsibilities include:
   

  

* Designing and operating Cloud Native Data & AI platforms (On-Prem)
* Contributing to end-to-end Data & AI solution design
* Installing and maintaining AI environments and platform services
* Deploying applications using Kubernetes and Helm
* Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines
* Ensuring strong observability, logging and troubleshooting
* Supporting development teams with platform improvements
* Implementing Infrastructure-as-Code and automation
* Working with DevSecOps and security-focused practices


 Occasional travel may be required.
   

  

 Your Profile
   

  

 We are looking for someone who enjoys working where AI, infrastructure and automation meet. You are collaborative, curious and comfortable working in modern cloud-native environments.
   

  

 You likely have experience with several of the following:
   

  

* Linux environments
* Kubernetes and Helm
* CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, ArgoCD or TeamCity
* DevOps or platform engineering
* Observability, logging and troubleshooting
* Programming in Python or Go
* Cloud-native applications and integrations
* Infrastructure automation such as Terraform or Ansible


 You also have strong communication skills, good English proficiency, and a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science or a similar field.
   

  

 Experience with any of the following is considered a plus:
   

  

* Agentic AI or AI-assisted development
* AI/ML development using Python
* LLM concepts such as prompting or RAG
* DevSecOps and security scanning
* Kubernetes operators
* AI or cloud certifications (AWS / Google / Microsoft)
* NVIDIA AI certifications
* Agile methodologies such as SAFe


**What You Will Be Part Of**
 Here you have the opportunity to influence and contribute in your own unique way, and every contribution counts. We give you the opportunity to take on challenges and create smart innovations. In our friendly and tech-savvy world, there is space for you to grow. We are here to create safety and security for people and societies together.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defense and security company with a mission to help nations protect their populations and contribute to safety for people and societies. With 23,000 talented employees, Saab develops technology and solutions for a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab develops, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control systems, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden but operates globally, and Saab is part of many nations’ defense capabilities. Read more about us here.

title: Cloud utvecklare
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Minst 8 års erfarenhet
* Cloud Platforms
* Kubernetes Operations
* Datastores
* Performance Testing
* Automation
* Observability


**Application deadline:** 
 20-04-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: IT Arkitekt
description:
*Vi tror att framsteg och möjligheter skapas bäst tillsammans. Välkommen till en plats där samarbete gör skillnad.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Som IT-arkitekt hos Saab Business Area Surveillance kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att forma framtidens IT-lösningar ihop med vår verksamhet. Du kommer att arbeta nära affärsintressenter för att förstå deras behov och översätta dessa till robusta och effektiva IT-arkitekturer.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter kommer att omfatta:
   

  

* Design, utveckling och dokumentation av IT-arkitekturer och lösningar med hjälp av metoder som t ex. TOGAF och modelleringsspråk som Archimate.
* Säkerställa att arkitekturerna är i linje med affärsbehov, operationella krav och övergripande IT-strategi, samtidigt som de uppfyller strikta säkerhets- och regulatoriska krav som är en förutsättning för våra verksamheters produktionslicenser.
* Analysera befintliga IT-miljöer för att identifiera förbättringsområden och säkerställa att de möter nuvarande och framtida affärsbehov.
* Samarbeta med utvecklingsteam, IT-drift och säkerhetsfunktioner för att säkerställa framgångsrik implementering och livscykelhantering av IT-lösningar vilket kräver en praktisk förståelse av implementationerna.


 Rollen innebär både inrikes- och utrikesresor.
   

  

 Din profil
   

  

 Vi söker en analytisk och strukturerad person med en stark förmåga att lyssna och förstå affärsutmaningar. Du har en passion för att översätta dessa utmaningar till välstrukturerade IT-lösningar.
   

  

 Du som person är driven och kan ta ansvar för det du förväntas leverera. Du arbetar bra i samverkan med andra grupperingar för att få fram helhetslösningar i en komplex omgivning där många behöver bidra med kunskap. Du har en stark förmåga att kunna beskriva dina lösningar i text och bild och kan presentera för både IT och verksamheter på ett förståeligt sätt.
   

  

 Vi kommer att utbilda dig som är rätt person i nödvändiga verktyg och rutiner för vår verksamhet.
   

  

 Essentiell kompetens och erfarenhet:
   

  

* Gedigen erfarenhet av att arbeta som IT-arkitekt eller i en liknande roll med fokus på IT-infrastruktur, systemdesign och integration
* Erfarenhet från att arbeta i regulatoriskt styrda branscher som kraft, finans eller t.ex. inom försvars-, flyg- eller andra starkt reglerade sektorer och att designa/ta fram lösningar som uppfyller strikta säkerhets- och regulatoriska krav


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Kandidatexamen eller masterexamen inom informationsteknik, datavetenskap, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande
* God förståelse för och praktisk erfarenhet av arkitekturramverk som TOGAF och modelleringsspråk som Archimate är meriterande
* Erfarenhet från tillverkande industri
* Erfarenhet av arkitekturmodelleringsverktyg, särskilt Bizzdesign.
* Kunskap om bästa praxis inom cybersäkerhet och principer för dataintegritet


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

*Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.*

title: Solution Team Lead
description:
*Want to influence the bigger picture? At Saab, you can realise amazing innovations that keep people and societies safe. Together, we can truly make an impact – and your part matters.*
 Your role
   

  

 We’re seeking a Solution Team Lead to drive mission-critical digital solutions that protect people & societies and deliver measurable business value for defence and national security. You’ll blend business acumen with technical depth, bring senior-level experience from collaborating with executive stakeholders, and lead cross-functional teams to deliver outcomes that enhance operational capability. We embrace Agile ways of working.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

* Lead a cross-functional team to shape, deliver, and iterate digital solutions that increase readiness, resilience, and mission effectiveness while generating tangible business value.
* Partner with senior business management, programme teams, and technical leaders to translate mission goals into roadmaps, prioritize backlogs, and define clear success metrics and operational KPIs.
* Facilitate Agile ceremonies, remove impediments, and coach the team to continuously improve flow and delivery.
* Provide day-to-day leadership that fosters clarity, communication, and mentorship across the team.
* Ensure solution integrity across discovery, design, delivery, and run — balancing feasibility, scalability, security, and mission impact.
* Build trusted relationships with stakeholders, influence decisions with data and insight, and present with executive-level gravitas.
* Champion high standards for quality, reliability, cyber security, and compliance appropriate for defence and national security contexts.


 Your profile
   

  

 We are looking for a candidate with a background in Industrial Engineering, Data Science, or Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience. You should have a minimum of three years in leadership roles, including project management, with a proven track record of delivering high-performing initiatives. A strong technical background is essential for engaging in credible dialogue with engineers and architects. We value an agile mindset and practices, where you are comfortable driving incremental value delivery with clear outcomes. Exceptional stakeholder management, communication, and interpersonal skills are crucial, as is confidence in operating with senior leadership. We are seeking a proactive, business-oriented individual with a focus on generating business value.
   

  

 We also value if you have:
   

  

* Experience in defence, aerospace, regulated or safety-critical environments.
* Exposure to modern data platforms, cloud, integration patterns, and secure-by-design principles.


 We encourage applicants from diverse backgrounds. If your experience looks a little different from what we’ve outlined and you think you can bring value to the role, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.*
 What you will be part of
   

  

 Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 26,100 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here
   

  

 Why join us? At our company, you will own high-impact solutions that support service members, partners, and critical national infrastructure, making a real difference through your work. You will lead meaningful projects within a modern Digital Solutions organisation that enjoys strong executive sponsorship, providing ample opportunities for growth. We offer a flexible hybrid work model to ensure a healthy work-life balance. Additionally, you will be rewarded with a competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
   

  

 How to apply: Submit your CV along with a brief note highlighting a recent initiative you led, including the business problem you addressed and the outcomes achieved. Describe how you align stakeholders when trade-offs are tough. Additionally, provide an example of how you improved team flow or delivery quality.
   

  

*Kindly observe that this is an ongoing recruitment process and that the position might be filled before the closing date of the advertisement.*

title: Supporttekniker
description:
Har du arbetat något/några år i en servicedesk, som onsite-tekniker eller IT-tekniker ? Vi på Nexer Infrastructure i Stockholm söker nu fler konsulter som är sugna på att fördjupa sina kunskaper samt utvecklas inom IT. Hos oss får chansen att arbeta hos välkända bolag i Stockholmsområdet.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
* Trygga anställningsvillkor och en fast månadslön
* Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter som konsult och en långsiktig plan hos Nexer
* En familjär atmosfär och teambuildingaktiviteter med dina Nexer-kollegor


**Om tjänsten**
 Som konsult inom IT-support arbetar du brett inom IT och användarstöd, och mer specifikt mot ramverk och verktyg så som Active Directory, Windows OS, Microsoft 365, grundläggande nätverksteknologier och ärendehanteringssystem såsom ServiceNow med flera. De flesta uppdragen innebär att du hjälper någon av våra kunder med IT-support på klientsidan och supporterar internt anställda genom telefon, mail, chatt och ärendehanteringssystem. I vissa uppdrag kan även onsite-support förekomma samt hårdvarusupport för datorer, kringutrustning, skrivare och AV utrustning.
   

  

**Vi ser gärna att du**
* Har minst ett års erfarenhet av arbete i servicedesk/first line support
* Motiveras av att lösa problem och lämna användaren med ett leende på läpparna
* Trivs i att bemöta människor och ge stöttning på ett pedagogiskt sätt
* Har obehindrade kunskaper i svenska i både tal och skrift


 Vi ser gärna att du är bekant med följande tekniker: Active Directory, Windows OS, Microsoft 365/Azure, Windows Remote Desktop, SCCM/Intune, arbete i ärendehanteringssystem samt grundläggande kunskap inom felsökning av nätverk. Det är också ett plus om du har supporterat Mac klienter tidigare.
   

  

 För att trivas i rollen som konsult hos oss tror vi att du har god analytisk förmåga, tar initiativ och är ihärdig när det gäller felsökning och problemlösning. Vi tror även att du har god samarbetsförmåga och trivs med att arbeta både individuellt och i grupp, eftersom du som konsult kan komma att arbeta i olika sammanhang.
   

  

**Mer om Nexer Infrastructure**
 Nexer Infrastructure (vi hette då Sigma IT Tech) startade sin verksamhet 2018 och är specialister på en sak – talanger inom drift, support och IT-infrastruktur. Vi hjälper företag att växa och framtids säkra sin kompetens med hjälp av flexibla konsulttjänster. Bland våra kunder finns många välkända aktörer som är marknadsledande inom sina respektive branscher.
   

  

 Som IT- konsult hos oss blir du väl omhändertagen och vi är måna om att du ska trivas. Vi lägger stor vikt vid att upprätthålla den goda stämningen i vår grupp, bland annat genom gemensamma aktiviteter som föreläsningar, after works och gemensamma lunch träffar. Blir du konsult hos oss lyssnar vi till dig, dina behov och i vilken riktning du vill utvecklas.
   

  

  

  

**Ansökan** 
  

  

 Då urval sker löpande ser vi gärna att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Vi ser fram emot att läsa den!

title: Data & AI Practice Lead - Sweden
description:
**Summary**
 The Sweden Data & Artificial Intelligence Practice Lead is responsible for driving the practices growth and solidifying Avanade’s position as a leading strategic partner. Reporting to the Sweden Practices Lead and aligning with the global practice, this role ensures Azure Data, Analytics services and Artificial Intelligence technical solution excellence and delivery integrity. The Sweden Data & Artificial Intelligence Lead will oversee technical execution, cultivate team skills in current and emerging Microsoft technologies, and implement a comprehensive talent strategy to support business needs.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Implement the global Data & Artificial Intelligence practices strategy within Sweden.
* Set and communicate Sweden practice priorities.
* Lead Swedens Data & Artificial Intelligence Practice in line with agreed plans and KPIs.
* Provide feedback loop upwards to drive continuous improvement.
* Identify opportunities for inorganic growth.
* Own and extend client relationships, becoming a client advisor with tangible contributions within Sweden and clients, helping broaden the the client network, identify opportunities for growth, and deliver an exceptional client experience.
* Cultivate and sustain a close working relationship with local Microsoft Product Engineering Groups and relevant Accenture leaders; and with on-, near, and offshore delivery centers positioning us as the partner of choice and important source of product feature feedback.
* Establish and maintain close relationships with key ecosystem partners in Sweden to facilitate collaboration in solutioning and delivery.
* Stay informed of client feedback, emerging trends, and innovations, providing ideas to global for new opportunities for practice-relevant solutions to maintain competitive edge.
* Foster and incubate innovations locally. Help establish and support innovative strategies to lower our cost to serve based on market demands.
* Collaborate with Swedens client teams to customize GTM motions and develop technical solutions for clients. Harvest best-in-class local solutioning assets and best practices and provide to global.
* Hold local accountability for shaping practice-specific technical solutions, providing oversight on all deals to maintain solution integrity. Address delivery quality escalations and ensure delivery best practices are being solutioned and delivered.
* Provide thought leadership relevant to the practice, enhancing our impact in the market.
* Ensure Swedens Data & Artificial Intelligence practice has sufficient capacity to support client teams from pre-sales assets, to solutioning, to delivery of practice-related solutions.
* Contribute to and execute the global growth program within the practice for critical skills, including certifications, to keep employees in all sourcing options (on-, near-, & offshore) at the forefront of current and emerging Microsoft technologies.
* Leverage global job families, skills, & project roles to deliver consistent practice solutions.
* In alignment with the global practice and Swedish client teams, define a holistic country‑level talent strategy for Sweden that includes skills, headcount, and location across all sourcing options to meet client demand, support the I&D agenda, and develop a future-ready workforce.
* Own accountability for Swedens practice market utilization and chargeability, ensuring targets are met or exceeded. Collaborate to address any staffing challenges that arise.
* Execute local programs to drive employee engagement, retention, and well-being, cultivating a highly skilled and motivated workforce within the practice.
* Communicate career pathways, support leadership development, and own succession planning for the practice. Drive employees to broaden their skill sets, secure promotions, and encourage experience in diverse roles.
* Own talent and performance management processes for assigned practice members in Sweden. Includes accountability for leading Talent Discussions, understanding talent pipeline, and making pay and promotion decisions in collaboration with HR to ensure consistent standards and reward structures are used.


**Qualifications**
**Skills and experiences**
* Proven experience leading teams with a focus on delivering results, growing skills, fostering culture, and EVP.
* Strong understanding of Analytics Services, Azure Data and AI, ensuring technical excellence and solution integrity.
* Ability to build and maintain strong client relationships, ensuring the delivery of high-quality solutions that meet regional client needs.
* Experience working within a matrix, aligning regional goals with global strategies while addressing local market needs.
* Demonstrated ability to capitalize on growth opportunities, ensuring the practice remains competitive and responsive to market trends.
* Strong delivery skills and experience delivering complex projects.
* Significant relevant consulting experience designing, selling, and leading client engagements with Azure Data Solutions, Artificial Intelligence adoption and integration, containerization techniques and automation deployment.


**Characteristics That Demonstrate Success For This Role**
* Mature decision maker, strong leader.
* Master negotiator and relationship builder.
* Able to see, evaluate and master unique skillset in each practice member.
* Act as a brick wall between business and client teams.
* Great communicator of priorities and expectations.

title: Digital Transformation Lead
description:
*BROMMA is a division of Kalmar, operating under its own brand. BROMMA has been the leading manufacturer of crane spreaders ever since its formation in the 1960s. Today we have, by far, the highest market share of the world’s spreader suppliers. Today, our spreaders are currently in use in 99 of the top-100 ports worldwide.*
*BROMMA sales and service network has a wide-reaching footprint. We are present with own sales offices on all continents, and with an extensive network of agents, we are able to support customers in every country in the world.*
*More information about BROMMA can be found on www.bromma.com*
**Join us and take your career to the next level**
 We are looking for a Digital Transformation Lead to join our team in Kista and play a pivotal role in shaping Bromma’s digital future. In this role, you will define and execute our digital strategy, ensuring that we remain at the forefront of the cargo handling industry through practical, scalable, and business-driven technology. This is not a purely strategic role — you will turn vision into action. You will lead the implementation of Bromma’s digital roadmap, take hands-on responsibility for the technical setup and development of our Information Management (IM) systems, and drive transformation initiatives from concept to execution.
   

  

 Reporting to the Director Digitalisation and Sustainability, you will operate with a high degree of autonomy while collaborating closely with external partners and teams across the organization. Your focus will be on shaping sustainable, forward-looking solutions that support how we work today and position us for the future.
   

  

**What Are Your Key Responsibilities**
 As the Digital Transformation Lead at Bromma, you will work closely with internal stakeholders and external vendors to:
   

  

* Manage and deliver IT projects, overseeing the full cycle from implementing new capabilities to the continuous development and upgrading of existing applications.
* Drive our data and analytics strategy through hands-on development, specifically building out new capabilities within the Google Cloud Platform (e.g., Data Studio and Connected Sheets).
* Refine and build data models to ensure better integration and smoother data flow across our global platforms and business processes.
* Implement and optimize AI-driven tools, focusing on practical applications that improve our day-to-day business operations.
* Play a key role in major technology transitions, including our global ERP modernization and the enhancement of service delivery tools and processes.
* Develop and maintain Bromma’s IM architecture, ensuring a cohesive and functional strategy across our entire digital landscape.
* Work across a diverse technology stack with systems like SAP, Salesforce, Tacton CPQ, and Hybris eCommerce to solve technical and business challenges.


**What We Offer You**
*"Respect is how we work — across departments, across borders, across job titles. "*
* Rewards that truly count: We create opportunities for growth through diverse experiences and uphold fair, gender-neutral pay, fostering a culture built on equity, empowerment, and continuous development. We also offer a comprehensive rewards package which combines flexibility, wellness, and recognition.
* Safety that moves us forward: Build your career with a company rooted in safety since the 1940s, ensuring stability and an environment that empowers you to speak and be heard.
* Purpose that drives change: You'll contribute to solutions that transform global trade, creating environmental and operational innovations. You'll be in the driver's seat of ideas, developing digital technologies that set industry standards and position us as the forerunner.
* People who move together: You'll collaborate with people who build lasting relationships through global expertise, connections, and a commitment to sustainability.


 Become part of our global network of 5,300 professionals across 120+ countries, where your work drives innovation, sustainability, and meaningful impact around the world.
   

  

**What You Bring To The Role**
 We are looking for a pragmatic professional who enjoys the intersection of strategy and execution. To thrive in this role, you will have:
   

  

* Proven Digital Leadership: Significant experience driving digital transformation projects within large, international enterprise environments.
* Project Management Expertise: A solid track record of managing IT projects from start to finish, with the ability to navigate both Waterfall and Agile delivery methods.
* Technical Breadth: Broad expertise in enterprise applications and a deep understanding of how they integrate to support business goals.
* Hands-on Analytics Skills: Practical experience in analytics development, particularly within Google Cloud Platform (Data Studio, Connected Sheets) and the wider Google Workspace ecosystem.
* Architectural Mindset: Extensive experience in Information Management (IM) architecture and the ability to translate digitalization strategy into functional reality.
* Navigating Complexity: Experience working within complex IT ecosystems, ideally in an industrial or manufacturing setting, with an understanding of how digital tools support physical operations.
* Strong educational Foundation: B.Sc or M.Sc degree preferably in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Language Skills: Fluency in English is essential as it is our corporate language. Proficiency in Swedish is considered a strong asset.


**Ready to elevate your career? Apply today!**
 Join us and take the next step in your career journey with Bromma! As the interviews may begin before the closing date, we encourage early applications. Please submit your CV in English.
   

  

 We support hybrid work arrangements, offering flexibility to balance office and remote work but don’t provide relocation support.
   

  

 For more information on the role, please contact Joakim Heijbel, Director Digitalisation and Sustainability, via email: joakim.heijbel@bromma.com.
   

  

 Closing Date: 15/3/2026
   

  

 #Bromma
   

  

*Bromma is part of Kalmar.*
**About Kalmar**
*Kalmar (Nasdaq Helsinki: KALMAR) is moving goods in critical supply chains around the world, with the vision to be the forerunner in sustainable material handling equipment and services. The company offers a wide range of industry shaping heavy material handling equipment and services to ports and terminals, distribution centres, manufacturing and heavy logistics. Headquartered in Helsinki, Finland, Kalmar operates globally in over 120 countries and employs approximately 5,300 people. In 2025, the company's sales totalled approximately EUR 1.7 billion. www.kalmarglobal.com*

title: Security Solution Area Specialist
description:
**Overview**
 Microsoft Elevate is chartered with the mission of bringing the power of technology to every non-profit and humanitarian organization to accelerate Social Good. This organization will bring together our donation and grants programs, industry solutions, commercial sales efforts and partner ecosystems to empower non-profits globally to address the world’s most pressing needs. Profits generated from this business will be reapplied to scaling operations and investments for Microsoft’s public good investments. This is a dynamic and fast-growing business focused on helping organizations on the front line of change to do their best work to create inclusive and enduring positive impact throughout our communities.
   

  

 As a Sales Specialist, you will engage with customer stakeholders to identify and prioritise sales opportunities, using AI-powered market intelligence and predictive analytics. You analyse market gaps, align solutions with customer priorities, and collaborate across teams to enable Security transformations. Engages in sales pipeline reviews with internal stakeholders to drive forecasting accuracy and meeting sales targets, ensuring the use of AI-powered analytics and forecasting tools to enhance precision. Drives sales strategies tailored to each customer's security priorities, showcasing Microsoft's dedication to secure, AI-powered transformation and addressing their specific needs within the customer success plan.
   

  

 Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Customer Engagement
   

  

* Qualifies sales opportunities using AI-driven frameworks and best practices. Supports strategy development for complex deals, collaborates with cross-functional teams throughout the deal lifecycle, and applies proven methods to win customer buy-in, close sales, and manage risks.
* Develops sales strategies focused on customer security needs, aligning with Microsoft's secure, AI-driven transformation. Reviews feedback to implement recovery plans and builds relationships with stakeholders to support satisfaction goals. Coordinates partner resources and co-selling throughout the sales lifecycle, ensuring partnership health and strategic alignment for accelerated customer value.


 Sales & Pipeline Management
   

  

* Evaluates business trends and identifies emerging opportunities to enhance the customer portfolio and foster innovation. Applies advanced technologies, such as AI sales agents, automation growth. Utilises data on propensity, renewal, consumption, and usage to inform and prioritise sales strategies. Coordinates with assigned partners for each account or opportunity, ensuring effective collaboration with teams throughout the deal lifecycle.
* Reviews sales pipelines with internal teams to improve forecasting accuracy and meet targets, using AI analytics tools for greater precision. Maintains pipeline hygiene to track sales metrics, monitor customer adoption, identify intervention opportunities, and support solution value realization, expansion, and reliable renewals.


 Sales Strategy
   

  

* Analyzes markets and aligns sales plays with customer priorities using AI-driven analytics to predict trends. Collaborates across teams to propose solutions matching business objectives and addresses gaps to drive market engagement and execution.
* Collaborates with cross-organizational teams to assist in developing solutions that support AI and cloud-based transformations for both existing and new customers in the region, with attention to integrating advanced AI technologies and cloud services. Utilizes established strategies and engages with customers to present Microsoft's offerings within the current market. Acts as an advisor to customers and provides guidance on adopting security technologies and solutions that align with their objectives and facilitate digital transformation.
* Leverages whitespace analysis and partners with others to identify business opportunities and market gaps within the assigned market domain, utilizing AI-driven market intelligence tools to assess trends and insights. Evaluates and disseminates market intelligence, trends, and insights across the team. Leverages established market analysis approach to ensure alignment with strategic directives and market trends.
* Leads discussions with customer stakeholders and decision makers to identify, qualify, prioritize and accelerate sales opportunities. Acts as a point of contact and collaborates with internal stakeholders within and across organizations to drive to customer success.
* Engages with account teams to align the customer's security transformation vision with their business priorities and success objectives. Incorporates and reinforces security principles in customer interactions, opportunity, and pursuits to maintain trust and compliance standards.


**Qualifications**
 Required/minimum qualifications
   

  

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Information Security, Information Security, or related field AND solid demonstratable experience in technology-related sales or account management OR equivalent experience.
* Cyber Security Sales experience


**Additional Or Preferred Qualifications**
* Relevant certifications from Microsoft or competitive platforms of similar product (e.g., SC-900 or SC100-400)


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

title: Data Engineer
description:
Auctionet is a marketplace where auction houses from Sweden, Great Britain, Finland, Spain, Germany, and Denmark sell furniture, art, design objects, collectibles, and much more. We are now looking for a
 **Data Engineer** 
 who enjoys working close to both
 **infrastructure and analytics teams** 
 , and who wants to help build a powerful, reliable data platform at Auctionet.
   

  

 This will be the
 **first dedicated Data Engineer** 
 at Auctionet, giving you real influence over how our data platform is built, operated, and used.
   

  

**About the Role** 
 We offer a role for someone who likes to understand the
 *full data stack* 
 — from how data is stored and processed, to how it is modeled and used by analysts and the business. You will work closely with our Data & Analytics Lead and play a key role in shaping how data engineering is done at Auctionet.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Designing and maintaining data ingestion from internal and external sources
* Building and operating reliable ELT pipelines end-to-end (from raw data to trusted datasets)
* Developing and owning analytical data models using dbt
* Operating and improving our self-hosted data platform on Kubernetes
* Working with performance, cost efficiency, and scalability at the platform level
* Ensuring high data quality through testing, monitoring, and documentation
* Acting as a bridge between infrastructure, analytics, and product teams


 This role is based in
 **Stockholm** 
 , with the possibility to work
 **partly remote** 
 .
   

  

**About the Team**
