Du rör dig i virtualiserade och containerbaserade miljöer som VMware och Docker/Kubernetes och får utrymme att prova ny teknik när den dyker upp.
* Arbeta med lösningar från flera leverantörer som Cisco, Juniper, HPE/Aruba, Palo Alto, Fortinet och Azure. Certifieringar är ett plus, men det som väger tyngst är din vilja att hela tiden ta nästa steg och lära dig mer.
* Utveckla och förvalta nätverkslösningar som klarar dagens krav och samtidigt förbereder kunderna för det som kommer härnäst. Du samarbetar nära både kollegor och kunder, testar idéer, utforskar ny teknik och vässar din kompetens inom allt från SD WAN och datacenter till moln och nätverkssäkerhet.


**Vi tror att du:**
* Har minst tre-fem års erfarenhet av nätverk och säkerhet i större eller komplexa miljöer, där du både arbetat praktiskt med drift/implementation och haft ett tydligt inslag av design/arkitektur.
* Trivs med att växla mellan strategiskt och operativt arbete. Du gillar att ta ansvar för hur lösningar hänger ihop, men vill också fortsätta vara nära tekniken.
* Är van att navigera mellan olika teknologier och leverantörer och kan motivera dina val, både inför tekniker och beslutsfattare.
* Talar och skriver svenska obehindrat och har en nyfikenhet som driver dig att både fördjupa din tekniska kompetens och utvecklas i en mer arkitektonisk riktning.


**Varför HiQ?**
 Sedan 1995 har HiQ hjälpt kunder och användare att göra livet enklare med teknik, design och kommunikation. Vi har alltid haft två fokus: att ha roligt på jobbet och att leverera bättre lösningar än förväntat – det är det som driver oss! Som HiQ:are är vi stolta över vår kultur där resultat, ansvar, enkelhet och glädje står i centrum. Vi tror på samarbete för att nå gemensamma mål och på att stötta varandra att växa. Här får du inte bara utveckla din egen kompetens, utan också chansen att lära av, leda och inspirera dina kollegor.
   

  

 Låter det spännande? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt nätverk, vi ser fram emot att höra hur du vill bidra till vår gemensamma resa!

title: Konsultchef
description:
**Vill du arbeta med försäljning där varje relation gör skillnad?** 




  





 RentalCare söker nu fler affärsdrivna Konsultchefer som vill kombinera uppsökande försäljning, relationsbyggande och entreprenörskap – i ett bolag som växer snabbt i både Sverige och Norge.
 



  





 Det här är en roll för dig som trivs i högt tempo, motiveras av tydliga mål och vill utvecklas i en prestationsdriven miljö med en stark teamkultur.
 



  





**Om RentalCare** 




 RentalCare är ett måldrivet bemanningsföretag med hjärta för vården. Vi matchar rätt kompetens till rätt uppdrag inom vård och omsorg och befinner oss i en stark tillväxtfas.
 



  





 Vår framgång bygger på relationer, kvalitet och ett starkt affärsdriv. Hos oss får du stor frihet under ansvar – och möjligheten att växa tillsammans med bolaget.
 



  





  





**Rollen som Konsultchef** 




 Som Konsultchef driver du din egen affär inom vårdbemanning och ansvarar för hela processen – från headhunting och relationsbyggande till försäljning och uppföljning. Det är en roll med högt tempo, tydliga mål och stort eget ansvar, samtidigt som du har ett team runt dig som stöttar och vill se dig lyckas.
 



  





 Rollen är tydligt aktivitetsdriven och telefonen är ditt viktigaste arbetsverktyg. Du behöver trivas i ett högt tempo med många dagliga kontakter med både konsulter och kunder. En stor del av arbetet sker via telefon, för att lyckas behöver du vara bekväm med ett strukturerat arbetssätt där du kontinuerligt arbetar uppsökande och i genomsnitt genomför 50–80 samtal per dag.
 



  





**Du kommer att:** 



* Arbeta uppsökande med rekrytering av konsulter
* Skapa och utveckla långsiktiga relationer
* Matcha rätt konsult till rätt uppdrag
* Förhandla, följa upp och utveckla samarbeten
* Säkerställa kvalitet i hela processen
* Kontakta och utveckla affärer med kunder inom offentlig och privat sektor



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Du har erfarenhet av försäljning och trivs i en roll där aktivitet, driv och struktur är avgörande.
 



 Vi tror att du:
 


* Har arbetat med uppsökande försäljning och är van vid högt tempo
* Är självgående och tar stort ansvar för dina resultat
* Trivs i en prestationsdriven miljö
* Är coachbar och vill utvecklas kontinuerligt
* Har positiv energi och bidrar till teamet
* Är en lagspelare – vi tror på prestation utan vassa armbågar



  





 Erfarenhet från telefonbaserad försäljning eller idrott/tävlingsmiljö är meriterande.
 



  





**Vår kultur & värdegrund** 




 Vi är stolta över den kultur vi byggt – den är en stor anledning till att våra medarbetare stannar och utvecklas. Hos oss gäller:
 



  





 Arbetsmoral i världsklass
 



*Vi gör alltid vårt yttersta och ser det som en skyldighet mot oss själva och våra kollegor.* 




  





 Ödmjukhet & teamanda
 



*Vi vet att vi bara lyckas tillsammans – när alla bidrar.* 




  





 Lead by example
 



*Vi visar vägen genom våra handlingar, varje dag.* 




  





 Vi har kul tillsammans
 



*Vi presterar bättre när vi har kul – och vi har kul när vi presterar.* 




  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 



* En arbetsplats med hög energi, frihet och stark gemenskap
* Tydliga mål och möjlighet att påverka din egen utveckling
* Ett team där vi stöttar, utmanar och firar framgång tillsammans
* En roll som utvecklar både din affärsförmåga och ditt självledarskap



  





**Lönemodell** 




 Vi erbjuder en grundlön på 27 000 kr/mån samt en resultatbaserad provision utan övre gräns, vilket ger dig både trygghet och möjlighet att påverka din inkomst genom prestation.
 



  





**Krav** 



* Minst 3 års erfarenhet från uppsökande försäljning och/eller telefonförsäljning
* Är flytande i svenska
* Möjlighet att arbeta heltid från vårt kontor i Stockholm



  





**Vad händer nu?** 




 Vi rekryterar löpande, så vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan!
 



  





 Första steget i processen är en digital intervju via Teams med HR, där vi lär känna dig lite bättre och berättar mer om rollen och RentalCare.
 



  





**Startdatum:** 
 13 april 2026
 



**Placering:** 
 Tjänsten är placerad på vårt kontor i centrala Stockholm.
 



 Arbetet utgår från kontoret med möjlighet till hybridarbete upp till två dagar i veckan.
 



  





*Som en del i vår rekryteringsprocess gör vi bakgrundskontroll på de kandidater som går vidare.*

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our team at a pivotal point in our growth.
 



 You'll take on real technical ownership — contributing to architecture decisions, setting the standard for code quality, and helping shape how we build. The best person for this role brings strong engineering instincts, takes initiative without being asked, and genuinely cares about the impact of their work.
 



  





**What you'll be doing** 



* Designing and building scalable, maintainable systems across the stack
* Contributing to architectural decisions and technical strategy
* Raising the bar through thoughtful code reviews and engineering best practices
* Collaborating with product and design to deliver solutions that are both technically sound and user-focused
* Taking end-to-end ownership — from initial scoping through to production and beyond
* Mentoring engineers and investing in the growth of those around you



  





**What we're looking for** 



* 5+ years of software engineering experience in a product-driven environment
* Strong proficiency in Python, TypeScript, Go, or Java
* Solid understanding of distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and modern delivery practices
* Clear, confident communicator — comfortable bridging technical and business conversations
* High ownership mentality and a track record of seeing things through

title: Systemutvecklare .NET
description:
*Vill du arbeta med modern systemutveckling i ett team där kultur, utvecklingsmöjligheter och trygghet står i centrum? Hos oss får du möjlighet att påverka och driva utvecklingen framåt, samtidigt som du utvecklas både tekniskt och personligt. Vi söker dig som brinner för att skapa hållbara och kvalitativa lösningar – och vill vara en nyckelperson i vårt produktteam.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Systemutvecklare .NET blir du en viktig del av vårt produktteam inom IT-utveckling, där vi arbetar agilt i tåget. Du ansvarar för att systemutvecklingen sker på ett kvalitativt och hållbart sätt, och bidrar till att utveckla ny funktionalitet och förbättra våra system. Du är med i hela processen – från krav till kod, test och deploy – och ser till att systemen är rätt utvecklade och underhållna. Hos oss får du en trygg arbetsmiljö, god stämning och stora möjligheter att utvecklas vidare.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Arbeta med .NET Core (C# och VB.net) samt containerlösningar som OpenShift och Kubernetes.
* Hantera DevSecOps, CI/CD och infrastrukturtjänster för automatiserade, säkra och spårbara releasecykler.
* Utveckla backend och API-plattformar, samt bidra med fullstack-kompetens om du har det.
* Implementera molnlösningar, främst containerapps inom Azure Cloud.
* Använda Domain-Driven Design och clean code för att bygga modulära, lättunderhållna och skalbara system.
* Ta ägarskap över systemutvecklingen och driva den framåt tillsammans med teamet.
* Hjälpa till att förstå systemkrav, utveckla koden, testa och göra deploy till servrar.
* Underhålla applikationen efter implementation.


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Akademisk examen inom datavetenskap.
* Minst 5 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet efter examen.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av .NET Core (C# och VB.net).
* Erfarenhet av containerlösningar som OpenShift och Kubernetes.
* God kunskap inom DevSecOps, CI/CD och infrastrukturtjänster för automatiserad integration och leverans.
* Erfarenhet av backend-utveckling och API-plattformar.
* Förståelse för digitala teknologier och plattformar, särskilt inom AI och containerapps inom Azure Cloud
* Förmåga att tillämpa Domain-Driven Design och skriva clean code för modulära och skalbara system.


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Fullstack-kompetens.
* Kunskap om affärsmodeller, kundbehov och marknadstrender.
* Förmåga att fatta beslut baserat på experiment och data.
* Erfarenhet av agila utvecklingsmetoder och samarbete i tvärfunktionella team.
* Vidareutveckling av digitala lösningar som bidrar till tillväxt, stabilitet och pålitlighet.
* Förmåga att utforma system och tjänster utifrån kunders behov och beteenden.


 Som person har du starkt självledarskap och är en lagspelare som trivs i en miljö där samarbete och öppen dialog är självklara delar av vardagen. Du är kommunikativ, hjälpsam och lyhörd, med utmärkt analytisk förmåga och högt engagemang. Du har förmåga att inspirera och motivera team och organisation genom förändring, och använder teknik som ett verktyg för innovation och kreativitet. Du är drivande och prestigelös och bidrar aktivt till att utveckla både dig själv och verksamheten.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: katerina.georgiadou@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: susanne.hirsch2@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: bitte.franzen-molander@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Fondliv är Länsförsäkringsgruppens fondförsäkringsbolag och en ledande aktör inom pensionssparande, särskilt inom tjänstepension. Vår verksamhet präglas av ett starkt kundfokus och ett målmedvetet arbete för att leverera trygga och kvalitativa sparlösningar. Hos oss är du med och bidrar till att människor får det pensionsliv de önskar – ett arbete som verkligen gör skillnad.
   

  

 Digital Utveckling inom Fondliv är en gruppering som tror på digitalisering genom utveckling och att det är nödvändigt för att förenkla och förbättra arbetsprocesser. Men det är också en möjlighet att skapa skräddarsydda och sömlösa kundupplevelser genom digitala kanaler vilket förbättrar kundnöjdhet och lojalitet. Vi vill skapa nya möjligheter för innovation, affärsutveckling och anpassningsförmåga. Vi vill kunna leverera bättre produkter, erbjudanden, tjänster och kundupplevelser jämfört med våra konkurrenter!
   

  

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens pensionslösningar? Hos Fondliv får du chansen att växa, utvecklas och göra skillnad – varje dag.

title: Senior Java Developer
description:
Founded in Helsinki in 2007,
 **Epassi** 
 is a pioneer in digital employee benefits and payments, and the leading global multi-benefits platform with a strong presence in the Nordics, Germany, the Netherlands, Italy, the UK, Ireland, Spain, Portugal, and France. Epassi’s innovative, unique and scalable solution combines all benefits into one mobile app-centric, user-friendly digital service, providing a digital marketplace for employee benefits.
   

  

**Epassi Group** 
 serves more than 50,000 employers and their over 30 million employees, with a partner network of more than 100,000 service providers. Epassi is a leading fintech company, recognized by the Financial Times as one of the fastest growing companies in Europe in 2022, 2023, 2024 and 2025, and ranked 32nd on Europe’s Long-Term Growth Champions 2025 list.
   

  

 Epassi – Boosting everyday wellbeing.
   

  

**Are you interested in joining of Europe's fastest growing companies? Do you want to impact the wellbeing of millions of users?**
 If yes, join us to make an impact in a fast-paced and dynamic environment where you’ll play a key role in driving financial accountability, supporting strategic decisions, and enabling sustainable growth.
   

  

**Epassi’s** 
 purpose is to boost everyday well-being. We are a leading provider of employee benefit solutions across Europe. We were established in Finland in 2007, and in 2008 we were the first company to launch a mobile-payable employee benefit payment solution in Europe. Since then, we have consistently grown, diversifying our products and introducing our services into new markets.
   

  

 Epassi has been awarded by the Financial Times as one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe on multiple occasions.
   

  

 We are currently hiring a
 **Senior Java Engineer** 
 to be based in Finland/Poland/Sweden.
   

  

**Your mission at Epassi**
 You will be part of a cross-functional product team responsible for building and evolving a modern platform that supports Epassi’s product vision. We are adding this role to strengthen our backend engineering capabilities and establish a solid, scalable foundation for Java Spring Boot services built for long-term growth.
   

  

 In this role, you will take ownership of one domain, contribute to critical architectural decisions, and help shape how we build, operate, and continuously improve our service landscape across the Epassi group.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Will Be**
* Design, build, and maintain high-quality Java Spring Boot microservices as part of our domain bounded context architecture
* Implement event-driven architecture for cross-domain communication and eventual consistency patterns
* Work with PostgreSQL as primary data storage, including schema design with multi-tenancy support and data isolation
* Implement RESTful APIs with proper versioning, rate limiting, and API gateway integration
* Ensure high standards for code quality, comprehensive testing (unit, integration, contract), performance optimization, and security best practices
* Collaborate closely with Product, Frontend (React Native), DevOps, and other backend teams across multiple European markets
* Participate in architectural discussions and technical design reviews, and contribute to platform-wide standards and best practices


**You’ll Be Successful In This Role If You**
* Deliver production-ready, scalable microservices that meet target architecture specifications
* Implement clear domain boundaries that avoid cross-domain coupling while enabling integration through well-defined APIs and events
* Maintain code quality with >80% test coverage and contribute to architectural decision records (ADRs) that shape the platform’s future
* Take ownership of the reliability and operability of backend services
* Proactively identify and reduce technical debt
* Communicate clearly and work effectively in a cross-functional team
* Support reliable delivery and smooth operations with a “you build it, you run it” mindset


**What You’ll Be Doing (daily)**
* Join a 15-minute stand-up with your cross-functional domain team to align on progress and blockers
* Design and implement features in your assigned domain using Java Spring Boot
* Write clean, testable code with comprehensive unit and integration tests, aiming for >80% coverage before code review
* Participate in code reviews via pull requests, providing constructive feedback and learning from peers
* Monitor synchronization metrics, investigate and resolve data consistency issues
* Collaborate with frontend engineers to clarify API contracts and coordinate feature releases
* Participate in architectural discussions and design reviews for new domain capabilities or cross-cutting concerns
* Deploy services to staging and production using CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), using feature flags for gradual rollouts
* Debug production issues using distributed tracing and structured logging


**What You Should Bring**
* 5+ years of professional software development experience, including 3+ years focused on Java backend development
* Strong expertise in Java (17+) and Spring Boot, including Spring Data JPA, Spring Security, and Spring Cloud
* Hands-on experience with microservices architecture (service decomposition, API design, inter-service communication patterns)
* Solid understanding of Domain-Driven Design (DDD): bounded contexts, aggregates, domain events, anti-corruption layers
* Strong knowledge of relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred), including schema design, indexing, query optimization, and transaction management
* Experience with event-driven architectures using message brokers (Kafka, RabbitMQ, AWS SNS/SQS)
* Proficiency in RESTful API design, including versioning, documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger), and rate limiting
* Strong testing mindset (JUnit, Mockito), plus integration and contract testing (Pact)
* Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes, including deployment strategies and service mesh concepts
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions)
* Understanding of observability: structured logging, distributed tracing (Jaeger/Zipkin), and metrics (Prometheus/Grafana/Datadog)
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience


**Your Track Record**
* Delivered and operated microservices in production, showing ownership from design through deployment and maintenance
* Made measurable improvements to performance, reliability, or scalability (e.g., reduced latency, improved uptime, scaled traffic)
* Collaborated effectively in cross-functional teams, demonstrating strong communication and teamwork
* Contributed to technical decision-making through architecture reviews or design documents
* Mentored junior engineers or led knowledge-sharing sessions


**Your Competency Profile**
* Systems Thinking: You understand how components interact in distributed systems and can design for failure scenarios and trade-offs
* Ownership & Accountability: You take end-to-end responsibility and proactively improve operational health and technical quality
* Pragmatic Problem-Solving: You balance ideal solutions with practical constraints while moving the architecture forward incrementally
* Collaboration & Communication: You work well across teams and time zones, document decisions, and share knowledge
* Continuous Learning: You stay current, experiment, and adapt based on feedback and results
* Quality Mindset: You build maintainable, secure, well-tested services and advocate for strong engineering standards


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Be part of an ambitious growth journey and join a global community of driven, bold, entrepreneurial, yet humble Epassians in a company that is constantly evolving.
* Work with a clear purpose — boosting everyday wellbeing — and create a meaningful, positive impact on both individuals and society.
* Thrive in an open and inclusive culture with low hierarchy, where relationships are built on respect, camaraderie, and shared successes and challenges.
* Come as you are — we’ll bring out the best in you and support your personal and professional growth.
* Join a fast-growing tech company with a strong financial foundation, offering opportunities to grow and make an impact together with us.
* Benefit from an inspiring and supportive work environment where employee wellbeing is a true priority.
* Contribute to solidifying our position as the number one player in Europe’s employee benefit market and help shape the next wave of success.

title: SAP Cloud ERP Finance Architect
description:
**We help the world run better**
 At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.
   

  

**YOUR TEAM**
 We are experienced team of architects located across several Nordic countries. Our team works both with on customer assignments and with our sales colleagues to position viable approaches that support our customers’ situations. We help customers get approaches implemented and realize value. We conceptualize solutions, but we also enjoy getting our hands into the system. Together as a team, we make miracles. We are looking for and open-minded and flexible colleague who will complement our team of highly esteemed experts to make SAP Cloud ERP successful. Apply now, and let’s start discussion on how you can build your own track in SAP.
   

  

**Role Description**
 We are looking for a finance architect for SAP Cloud ERP. Your focus is on understanding end-to-end finance processes and principles, with deep finance domain expertise. You have solid experience with SAP ERP implementations, preferably in the public cloud, and a strong functional background. You listen carefully to uncover customer pain points and requirements, and you drive those requirements into design and delivery. You support and guide stakeholders to make sound decisions, steering them toward fit-to-standard solutions, SAP best practices, and relevant scope items. You lead finance process discussions and translate requirements into clear solution options and adoption roadmaps. You enjoy leading and guiding with a gentle, professional manner, collaborating internally and externally across the ecosystem to accelerate adoption.
   

  

 You can be located in any of the Nordic Countries. Relocation is not supported.
   

  

**As an SAP Cloud ERP and public cloud-focused finance architect, you will**
* Master the public cloud project lifecycle.
* Leverage a minimum of five years’ finance domain expertise and either at least two end-to-end SAP Cloud ERP public cloud implementations or two years of hands-on public cloud delivery experience, to guide customers confidently.
* Use a public-cloud architect approach to help customers design and adopt best practice, end-to-end solution concepts.
* Guide customers to maintain clean-core principles in SAP Cloud ERP, prioritizing fit-to-standard, standard scope items, and SAP Best Practices content, and using approved extensibility instead of core modifications.
* Support customers in automating their finance processes, leveraging intelligent capabilities and embedded AI within SAP Cloud ERP.
* Actively participate in delivery to demonstrate how modern SAP solutions can be adopted.
* Collaborate effectively with SAP partners.
* Manage internal teams and collaborate with partners during the solution approach definition process.
* Build trusted-advisor relationships with customer stakeholders.
* Partner with Sales and Account teams to present the benefits and value proposition of SAP finance solutions and architecture.
* Work with Sales on demand creation by attending customer or prospect meetings to present SAP services capabilities and delivery approach.
* Prepare system demos and discuss processes and functional features.


**YOUR PROFILE**
* You are used to leading customer discussions and have an approach that moves customers forward.
* You can take a helicopter view to see the overall architecture.
* You are eager to deep-dive when a concept requires a closer look.
* You use systems to prove that concepts are working.
* You can communicate easily with developers and management.
* Business communication in both English and the regional language is needed.


**Bring out your best**
 SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
   

  

**We win with inclusion**
 SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
   

  

 SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.
   

  

 For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.
   

  

 Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.
   

  

**AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
 For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
   

  

 Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

title: D365 ERP Finance & Supply Chain Technical Architect
description:
**Sammanfattning**
 Som
 **ERP Technical Architec** 
 t hos oss kliver du in i en nyckelroll där du sätter den tekniska riktningen i några av våra mest affärskritiska och komplexa uppdrag inom
 **Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain Management.**
 Du trivs i rollen som strategisk rådgivare, är trygg i dialogen med både IT och verksamhet och motiveras av att omvandla komplexa affärsutmaningar till skalbara, hållbara och innovativa lösningar. Du ser möjligheter där andra ser begränsningar – och du har förmågan att få med dig andra i din vision. Vi söker dig som vill ha verkligt inflytande.
   

  

 Du arbetar tillsammans med några av branschens främsta experter inom Microsoft Dynamics och digital transformation, i en kultur som präglas av samarbete, höga ambitioner och en stark vilja att skapa verkligt affärsvärde.
   

  

 Här får du utrymme att påverka, utvecklas och ta nästa steg i din karriär – samtidigt som du är med och gör skillnad på riktigt.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Rollen ger dig möjlighet att arbeta hos Microsofts främsta partner, med fokus på innovation, ledarskap och leverans av lösningar med stort affärsvärde. Du äger den övergripande arkitekturen och sätter riktningen för hur lösningen ska designas, integreras och skalas över tid. Här får du kombinera tekniskt djup med strategisk påverkan.
   

  

 I denna roll leder du definitionen och leveransen av den övergripande tekniska ERP-lösningen, inklusive systemintegrationer samt rekommendationer av ISV-lösningar (Independent Software Vendors) eller andra best-of-breed-lösningar.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära intressenter för att definiera teknisk arkitektur, säkerställa att lösningen möter verksamhetens behov och driva strategier för digital transformation. Rollen kräver djup expertis inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain Management samt god kunskap om best practice inom teknisk arkitektur för att leverera skalbara, säkra och högpresterande lösningar.
   

  

**Together We Do What Matters.**
**Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**
* Leda design av teknisk arkitektur för implementationer av Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain Management och säkerställa att lösningarna är i linje med affärsmål och tekniska best practices.
* Arbeta nära kunder, verksamhetsintressenter samt funktionella och tekniska team för att definiera lösningsroadmaps och arkitekturplaner.
* Ge vägledning kring best practice för affärskritiska ERP-lösningar, integrationer, säkerhet och styrning (governance).
* Designa komplexa integrationer mellan Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Supply Chain Management och tredjepartsapplikationer med hjälp av Azure Integration Services, Dataverse och API:er.
* Ansvara för teknisk leverans och säkerställa att lösningarna är skalbara, högpresterande och följer Microsofts rekommenderade metoder.
* Leda teknisk arkitekturstyrning samt ha övergripande ansvar för utveckling och driftsättning.
* Mentorskap och coachning av tekniska team samt bidra till en kultur präglad av innovation och kvalitet.
* Hålla dig uppdaterad kring Microsofts senaste innovationer och bidra till interna initiativ för kunskapsdelning.


**Qualifications**
**Egenskaper som skapar framgång i rollen**
 Du är en samarbetsinriktad person som brinner för att lösa problem med hjälp av teknik och använder dina goda sociala och organisatoriska färdigheter för att bygga positiva relationer. Du trivs i rollen som strategisk rådgivare, gillar komplexa utmaningar och motiveras av att omsätta affärsbehov till robusta, framtidssäkra lösningar.
   

  

* Konsultativ, samarbetsinriktad och skicklig på att bygga relationer
* Uthållig, anpassningsbar och flexibel
* Intellektuellt nyfiken och genuint passionerad för teknik
* Övertygande kommunikatör och engagerad thought leader inom branschen.


**En arbetsplats att växa på**
 Hos Avanade får du arbeta med affärskritiska och ledande teknologilösningar i en miljö som präglas av samarbete, inkludering och ambition. Du blir en del av ett kunnigt och stöttande team som delar med sig av sin erfarenhet – och som värdesätter din.
   

  

 Här finns möjligheterna. Nu är frågan – är du redo att ta dem?
   

  

**A great place to work**
 As you bring your skills and abilities to Avanade, you’ll get distinctive experiences, limitless learning, and ambitious growth in return. As we continue to build our diverse and inclusive culture, we become even more innovative and creative, helping us better serve our clients and communities. You’ll join a community of smart, supportive collaborators to lift, mentor, and guide you, and to lean on your expertise. You get a company purpose-built for business-critical, leading-edge technology solutions, committed to improving the way humans work, interact, and live. It’s all here, so take a closer look!
   

  

 We work hard to provide an inclusive, diverse culture with a deep sense of belonging for all our employees. Visit our Inclusion & Diversity page.
   

  

**Create a Future For Our People That Focuses On**
* Expanding your thinking
* Experimenting courageously
* Learning and pivoting


 Inspire greatness in our people by
   

  

* Empowering every voice
* Encouraging boldness
* Celebrating progress


 Accelerate the impact of our people by
   

  

* Amazing the client
* Prioritizing what matters
* Acting as one


**Learn more**
 Interested in knowing what’s going on inside Avanade? Check out our blogs:
   

  

* Avanade Insights That Matter
* Inside Avanade – explore what life is like workin

title: Senior Fullstack/Webb-utvecklare
description:
Vi söker en Lead App-utvecklare till Delorean
 



 Vill du ta täten i utvecklingen av nästa generations appar för några av Sveriges mest välkända varumärken? Vi söker dig som älskar React Native, har stenkoll på systemarkitektur och vill axla rollen som teknisk lead.
 



  




**Om företaget** 

 Vi är Delorean, en prisbelönt digital byrå som hjälper företag och organisationer att utveckla innovativa strategier, digitala tjänster och kreativa kommunikationslösningar. Vi är stolt vinnare av Årets Digitala Byrå 2024 och har ett härligt gäng medarbetare som brinner för att skapa digital framgång.
 



 Vi har en stark teamkänsla där du får vara med och påverka både din egen arbetssituation och företaget. Vi tror på att lära oss tillsammans och utvecklas med nya tekniker. Vi jobbar bland annat med kunder som 7-Eleven, Pressbyrån, Vogue Scandinavia, Nationalmuseum och Statens Konstråd.
 



  




**Om tjänsten** 

 Vi söker nu en erfaren App-utvecklare som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för våra app-projekt. Som utvecklare på byrå hos oss innebär det en varierad vardag där du bygger allt från avancerade konsumentappar med hög trafik till affärskritiska interna verktyg.
 



 I den här rollen förväntas du kunna ta en Lead-roll. Det innebär att du inte bara skriver kod, utan också är med tidigt i processen för att kravställa, arkitektera lösningar och guida både teamet och kunden mot de bästa tekniska valen.
 



 Vår filosofi är att använda rätt verktyg för utmaningen. Vi rör oss vant i gränslandet mellan app och tunga systemintegrationer. Därför ser vi att du har en solid grund i systemutveckling utöver din expertis inom mobilutveckling.
 



  




**Din roll i teamet** 
* Agera teknisk lead: Ansvara för arkitektur och tekniska vägval i våra app-projekt.
* Utveckling: Bygga högkvalitativa appar främst i React Native, men även brygga mot backend och övriga system.
* Koncept & Strategi: Ta fram tekniska specifikationer tillsammans med designers, UX-utvecklare och projektledare.
* Rådgivning: Ha direkt kundkontakt och förklara komplexa tekniska lösningar på ett begripligt sätt.
* Kvalitetssäkring: Driva code reviews och sätta standarden för stabil och skalbar kod.



  




**Vi ser att du har erfarenhet av** 
* **React Native:** 
 Du är expert på ramverket och har koll på både styrkor och begränsningar.
* **Systemutveckling:** 
 Du har en djupare förståelse för hur appar pratar med komplexa backends och integrationer.
* **API-design:** 
 Erfarenhet av att utveckla och konsumera RESTful API:er eller GraphQL.
* **Modern JavaScript/TypeScript:** 
 Du skriver modern, typsäker och välstrukturerad kod.
* **Svenska & Engelska:** 
 Du kommunicerar obehindrat på båda språken (svenska är ett krav från flera av våra kunder).



  




**Extra plus om du har koll på** 
* Native-utveckling (Swift/Kotlin) för de tillfällen då React Native behöver bryggas.
* Publiceringsprocesser för App Store och Google Play.
* Cloud-infrastruktur (GCP, Azure eller AWS).
* Testautomatisering och CI/CD för mobila plattformar.
* Erfarenhet av headless CMS (t.ex. Umbraco, Wordpress eller Optimizely).



  




**Varför ska du jobba på Delorean?** 
* Kollektivavtal: Trygga villkor, betald föräldraledighet och tjänstepension är en självklarhet.
* Friskvård: 5 000 kr per år för att du ska må bra.
* Utveckling: Individuella utvecklingsplaner och en kultur där vi lär av varandra.
* Inflytande: Här är du inte en anonym kodare; du är en nyckelspelare som påverkar både projekt och byråns framtid.



  





**Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan!**

title: Project Technical Engineering Entry Professional
description:
**Location:**

Ludvika, Dalarna County, Sweden
**Job ID:**

R0099556
**Date Posted:**

2026-03-10
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY SWEDEN AB
**Profession (Job Category):**

Engineering & Science
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**The opportunity**My name is Andrew Carruthers, and hope to be your new manager here in Ludvika. I manage the software department called “Sequence and Interlocking”, which is responsible for providing a safe and reliable operation of the switchgear in a HVDC station. This means we solve interlocking principles, status configurations, automated switching sequences and “ready for” conditions among many other things and we are a vital part of any HVDC station.


My responsibility as your manager is to provide a culture of inclusion, respect and learning, so it feels exciting, challenging, fun and fulfilling when coming to work.


We actively work on both soft skills and support each other in technical challenges and problems. “Team work at its best”, is our goal.


The chapters below under “Responsibility” and “Background” is to some extent a wish-list from our perspective, if you have parts of them or think you don’t have all the qualifications necessary, apply and let us decide if we can provide you with a future here with us.  



  

Technical Project Engineering is a broad term describing a range of engineering disciplines e.g. electrical, mechanical, chemical, civil, structural, automation and software engineering. All of these engineering disciplines include, discipline engineering and design; planning, risk assessments; coordination of resources.  



  

Key areas of responsibility:
  

Engineering development: Making sure all customer, legal and company requirements have been taken care of and that all multidisciplinary information has been included. Taking on new challenges and developing new solutions for our customers. Providing technical support for testing, installation and commissioning activities, and preparing complete project documents in area of your responsibility.
  

Being part of projects, providing cost effective quality solutions and delivering within budget and contract. Ensuring adherence to safety standards and mitigation of potential risks. Reviewing and approving scope, budget and schedule for assignments. Interacts directly with customers, officials, contractors and supply chain.  

  



**How you’ll make an impact**

At HVDC you will create a sustainable future by providing efficient ways to transport electrical power. If you are ready to meet the technological challenges within control and protection systems – together with a team of driven junior engineers and senior experts representing about 43 nationalities – then you can expect an equally exciting and ever-changing time ahead of you.


We are now looking for a project engineer in control and protection software integration, part of HVDC in Hitachi Energy in Ludvika. If you want to take the next step in your career, and contribute to develop a stronger, smarter, and greener grid – Join us now!


We’d like you to join us to:


* Create concept design for our customized control and protection systems.
* Work with detailed design, system integration and test-based development.
* Perform verification of our control and protection schemes – executed in test rooms and on-site.
* Collaboration is, in other words, a central part of your new position that will provide you with a great starting point in our organization with possibilities of further career opportunities. It will also give you the benefit to travel globally during the commissioning period at the end of each project.
* Lead a technical area and be part of a dedicated project team, in which we work together throughout all phases of our extensive projects.
* As an experienced engineer you would be part of a technical expert team providing guidance to junior engineers in technical issues and drive technical discussions with customers.

**Your background**

* You hold a university degree within a relevant technical area along with competence within system design or electrical expertise.
* Experience in control and protection systems
* It is an advantage if you have worked with commissioning of control and protection systems or if you have experience with control and protection system of HVDC project.
* Other valuable experience is earlier work with AC relays or digital protections.
* You have what it takes to plan and organize your own workday.
* You are a driven problem solver who eagerly takes initiatives and always delivers on time and according to expectations.
* In this position you are expected to be away abroad for periods of time.
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken.

**What we offer**

* Collective agreement

title: Account Manager
description:
AVEVA is a global leader in industrial software. Our cutting-edge solutions are used by thousands of enterprises to deliver the essentials of life – such as energy, infrastructure, chemicals and minerals – safely, efficiently and more sustainably.
We’re the first software business in the world to have our sustainability targets validated by the SBTi, and we’ve been recognized for the transparency and ambition of our commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion. We’ve also recently been named as one of the world’s most innovative companies.
If you’re a curious and collaborative person who wants to make a big impact through technology, then we want to hear from you! Find out more at AVEVA Careers.
For more information about our privacy policy and how to manage cookies, visit our Privacy Policy.
Job Title: Strategic Account Manager
Location: Sweden, Malmo - Hybrid/ Denmark, Copenhagen - Remote
Employment Type: Full-time  

The job
The Strategic Account Manager's purpose is to develop business with new accounts and expand our footprint within existing named accounts in a defined territory. The primary goal is to meet incremental revenue objectives and maximize penetration of AVEVA software solutions and services within these accounts (cross sell & upsell).
This person should be a team player and be able to positively conduct challenging business and commercial conversations with customers.  

Key responsibilities* Meet or exceed quarterly incremental revenue targets supporting the regional business plan.
* Maximizing revenue growth and customer outcomes through a robust cross-portfolio sales strategy, utilizing the AVEVA Strategic Sales Plays, focusing on delivering the greatest impact to our customers’ business.
* Uncover, direct and drive new revenue generation whilst retaining accountabilities for all commercial activity within the account from opportunity inception to contract closure.
* Define and execute Account Plans, which outlines your strategic and tactical approaches for achieving your targets.
* Plan and organize all related sales activities starting from prospecting through to closing business in line with AVEVA’s policies and processes including other written and verbal communication.
* Identify, pursue, and develop C- Level client relationships and, through the course of these interactions, deepen your understanding of their client’s digital initiatives and business drivers. These relationships will secure AVEVA’s position as a strategic partner providing significant value to the customer through transformational sales initiatives.
* Analyse ongoing performance using the AVEVA Account Manager Dashboard to provide monthly performance reporting, including long-term account strategies with current and proposed activities, customer visits, revenue status, and revenue forecast.
* Maintain and develop the customer pipeline following the AVEVA MEDDPICC forecasting protocols and maintain all activity within AVEVA’s CRM solution (Salesforce).
  

Essential requirements* Significant experience in sales, account management, or business development role selling software solutions across Utilities and Infrastructure, O&G, Transmission & Distribution or EPCs Owner Operators, or Design consultants, or parallel sectors.
* Well versed and experienced with IT Software and Solutions and business drivers and sector specific trends within the industries served by AVEVA (O&G, Transmission & Distribution, Water and Wastewater, Infrastructure, Manufacturing, Life Sciences/Pharma, Mining, Metals, Materials/Marine).
* You will be a self-starter, able to work to develop new client engagements through the entire sales cycle.
* Skilled and experienced in operating at various levels, from end-user to senior decision-makers within AVEVA’s target customer base, aligning their business problems with our technology solutions.
* A strong understanding of the business benefits of the AVEVA solutions and services, able to describe the product benefits.
* Commercial and analytical skills to identify market trends and opportunities for your nominated territory, creating dynamic business and account plans to exploit such opportunities.
* Strong communication skills in all forms – written, oral, email, presentation etc. Fluency in English and the local language to C1/C2 level is required
  

Desired skills* Domain expertise in an appropriate industry or market sector
* Degree qualified or a professional qualification in a relevant area to the key AVEVA industries
  

Commercial at AVEVA
Our Commercial team, comprised of over 2,000 dedicated colleagues, is the backbone of our customer relationships and business growth. From industry experts and solution architects to sales, support, success managers, and business operations, everyone shares a common goal: to deeply understand our customers' needs and deliver tailored solutions.  

If you're passionate about driving growth, tackling complex business challenges, and fostering strong customer relationships, you'll find success and fulfilment in our Commercial team.  

Find out more: https://www.aveva.com/en/about/careers/
AVEVA requires all successful applicants to undergo and pass a comprehensive background check before they start employment. Background checks will be conducted in accordance with local laws and may, subject to those laws, include proof of educational attainment, employment history verification, proof of work authorization, criminal records, identity verification, credit check. Certain positions dealing with sensitive and/or third party personal data may involve additional background check criteria.  

AVEVA is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to being an exemplary employer with an inclusive culture, developing a workplace environment where all our employees are treated with dignity and respect. We value diversity and the expertise that people from different backgrounds bring to our business.  

  

Come and join AVEVA to create the transformative technology that enables our customers to engineer a better world.

title: Embedded Verification Engineer
description:
Your role
  
As an Embedded Verification Engineer with us, you will work as a consultant, supporting leading automotive clients in the development and verification of next-generation embedded systems for vehicles. You will contribute to advanced development projects within areas such as vehicle control systems, ADAS, electrification, connectivity, and infotainment.
  
In this role, you will work closely with software developers, system engineers, and hardware teams to ensure high-quality, robust, and safe embedded solutions that meet automotive industry standards. Your work will include designing and implementing verification strategies, developing automated test solutions, and contributing to the continuous improvement of testing processes.
  
You will be involved in verification activities across multiple levels, from unit and integration testing to full system validation. The role also includes working with Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) and Software-in-the-Loop (SIL) environments, debugging complex embedded systems, and integrating automated tests into modern CI/CD pipelines.
  
As a consultant at Knowit, you represent the company at client sites, contributing not only with technical expertise but also with a professional, solution-oriented, and collaborative mindset. Through varied assignments and projects, you will gain exposure to different automotive domains and technical environments, providing excellent opportunities for professional growth.
  
Who are you?
  
  

**We are looking for someone with experience in:**  

Designing, developing, and maintaining verification and test solutions for embedded automotive systems, including developing and executing test cases at unit, integration, and system levels
  
  

Programming in C and/or C++, with a strong understanding of software programming hygiene such as readability, maintainability, modular design, version control discipline, and clean coding practices
  
  

Python and/or Bash scripting for automation and testing workflows
  
  

Working with embedded operating systems such as Linux, QNX, Android, or other RTOS environments, including basic knowledge of the Android framework
  
  

Version control and CI/CD tools such as Git, Gerrit, and Jenkins
  
  

Working in automotive development environments following ASPICE and/or ISO 26262
  
  

Verification and testing in HIL (Hardware-in-the-Loop) and/or SIL (Software-in-the-Loop) environments, as well as working with diagnostics, software download processes, and DBC files
  
  

You have a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, or a related field.
  
You are fluent in English. Swedish is highly meritorious depending on client assignment.
  
You are a curious person who enjoys exploring different domains within the automotive industry. You have a flexible mindset and enjoy adapting to rapidly evolving technologies. You are comfortable taking initiative and applying a software engineering mindset in a traditionally mechanically driven industry. Collaboration across disciplines and contributing to both technical solutions and process improvements comes naturally to you.
  
Meritorious experience
  
  

**It is considered a plus if you:**  

Have experience within automotive domains such as ADAS, powertrain, electrification, chassis, or vehicle connectivity
  
  

Have knowledge of AUTOSAR Classic and/or Adaptive, including basic understanding of ARXML and AUTOSAR configuration concepts
  
  

Have experience working with automotive communication protocols such as CAN, LIN, FlexRay, or Ethernet
  
  

Are familiar with test automation frameworks, test management tools, and development of safety-critical systems
  
  

Have curiosity and hands-on experience using AI as a coding partner, or experience architecting solutions with support from AI-based tools
  
  

Why Knowit?
  
At Knowit Connectivity, you will have the opportunity to work in an innovative and learning-oriented environment where you continuously develop your skills. We combine technology and creativity to create value for our customers and for society.
  
As a consultant with us, you will work with some of the most exciting technology challenges within the automotive industry. You will be part of a highly skilled and collaborative team that values knowledge sharing, technical excellence, and continuous improvement. Through diverse projects and assignments, you will have the opportunity to expand your expertise and grow professionally while contributing to the development of future mobility solutions.
  
Would you like to know more about what it’s like to work with us? Visit our website or contact us directly.

title: Execution Lead
description:

We are hiring **Execution Lead**for the position based in **Lund, Sweden (Onsite)**

**Job Summary:**



We are looking for an **Execution Lead** with strong expertise in C++ software development and embedded systems to contribute to the development of a modern automotive software platform. The role involves designing and developing framework functionality that powers a wide range of vehicle capabilities, including driver experience, active safety features, and advanced in-car software services. * Experience with **requirement analysis and test development** using common unit testing frameworks.

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities.

title: Rock Mechanics Engineer to Open Pit Production
description:
Step into a role where your geotechnical expertise directly shapes safe and efficient open pit operations in Svappavaara. Here, you’ll work close to the field and the planning teams, contributing insights that keep our production running securely and sustainably.


Ort: Svappavaara
Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning
Ansök senast: 2026-03-31  

**Shaping the future**
----------------------

At LKAB, we are leading the transformation of our industry toward a sustainable future. Just as we aim to reshape the world, we are committed to developing every individual on our team, both personally and professionally. Are you ready to help shape the future of the mining and mineral industry?


If you want a glimpse into what life is like for our employees in Svappavaara, click the link: LKAB Svappavaara



**Your role**
-------------

We are looking for a Rock Mechanics Engineer or Geologist to support short-term production planning and daily open pit operations at LKAB Svappavaara. The role is operational and field-focused, with emphasis on geotechnical safety, risk management and geology. A key part of the position is to conduct risk assessments, evaluate slope stability and provide geotechnical input to weekly and monthly mine plans.



You will work closely with geology, planning and production teams, carrying out pit inspections, assessing slope conditions, interpreting monitoring data and delivering timely recommendations to ensure safe and efficient mining.



At Svappavaara, the Mine Planning Department oversees both short-term and production planning for local deposits. The team includes professionals in surveying, geotechnical engineering, geology, and mine planning, working together to optimise operational performance.



**What you bring**
------------------

* Academic degree in geology, mining engineering or geotechnical engineering
* Experience in open pit mine production
* Solid knowledge of rock mechanics, geotechnical engineering, structural geology, and hydrogeology
* Fluency in English, both spoken and written; Swedish is a plus, or a willingness to learn
* A valid B-class driver’s license
* Experience with slope stability risk management and radar systems (desirable)
* Strong computer skills, experience with CAD and other technical software (desirable)


You are motivated to support the development of our open pit operations and enjoy working closely with colleagues from different disciplines. You take responsibility and show strong drive in your work, while staying attentive and adaptable. The role involves regular contact with many stakeholders, which means strong communication and collaboration skills are important.



**What we offer**
-----------------

In addition to the general benefits we offer — which you can find a bit further down — we can also offer you, who currently do not live in Sweden, the following:


* Relocation support for you and your family.
* Excellent conditions for settling in. We guide you through the official procedures necessary to settle in the country if you come from outside Sweden. We also provide temporary accommodation for a reasonable period and help you find a permanent place to live according to your personal needs.
* LKAB helps you learn Swedish, a tool for a better understanding of Swedish culture.
* The Swedish vacation law entitles all employees to five weeks of vacation per year, and four consecutive weeks during June, July, or August. Your contract may include extra vacation days.

**Additional information**
--------------------------

We strive for a fair and objective recruitment process. Therefore, we usually do not request cover letters. Instead, we ask you to answer questions related to the specific position you are applying for. Your responses help us understand your skills and experience, so please take the time to answer as clearly and thoroughly as possible.



Start: According to agreement



Location: Svappavaara, Kiruna municipality



Type of Employment: Permanent (tillsvidare), full-time. A six‑month probationary period may be applied



Contact: For more information about the position, please contact Robin Offermo, robin.offermo@lkab.com or Manuel Astorga, manuel.astorga@lkab.com



Union representatives Kiruna/ Svappavaara:



* Sakari Alanko, Unionen, +46 980-725 08
* Maja Krutrök, Ledarna, +46 980-535 50
* Peter Johansson, Akademikerföreningen, +46 980-718 79

Hanna Gustafsson Talent Acquisition Partner
Skicka e-post

-------------------------------

* Free access to LKAB:s own gym and our partners´facilities in Norrbotten
* Reward program
* Wellness allowance and educational support, along with access to an art association, leisure club, mountain cabins, and family activities
* Enhanced parental pay with up to 90% of your regular salary for up to six months (after one year of employment)
* Support and assistance in cases of illness or questions about work environment, health, wellness, and rehabilitation
* Compensation for dental care and protective eyewear, including terminal glasses
* Opportunity to apply for scholarships for both your and your children’s studies
* Access to our pension and insurance program with favourable rates
